Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Luminous Queen Sha Leiala]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — The Ninecloud Court restrains guests by the power of Luminous Queen Sha Leiala.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — Sha Leiala is the Luminous Queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Sha Leiala is the mother of Sha Miara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Sha Leiala ruled over the Ninecloud people for two hundred years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — Sha Leiala is a Monarch associated with the Ninecloud Court.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Sha Leiala is the Luminous Queen of the Ninecloud Court and appears as a presence of multicolored light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Luminous Queen Sha Leiala follows the Path of Celestial Radiance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Sha Leiala hasn't shown herself openly in years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Sha Miara is a direct descendant of Sha Leiala.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Leiala hated Reigan Shen.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
